# Packages installed via apt on Ubuntu / Debian.
# One package per line. Lines starting with # or blank lines are ignored.
# Third-party apt repos (Chrome, Brave, VS Code, 1Password, Tailscale, Insync,
# DBeaver, Discord, Cursor AppImage) are handled by deps/apt-third-party.sh.
git
curl
wget
gnupg
ca-certificates
apt-transport-https
zsh
stow
tmux
fzf
bat
fd-find
eza
git-delta
tk
libnotify-bin
libnotify4
btop
htop
mc
ncdu
ranger
smplayer
calibre
syncthing

# i3 desktop environment
i3
i3status
i3lock
picom
dunst
dmenu
rofi
xdotool
xautolock
nitrogen
x11-xserver-utils
maim
xclip
flameshot
pulseaudio
pavucontrol
playerctl
pasystray
xbacklight
xfce4-power-manager
network-manager-gnome
clipit
policykit-1-gnome
gnome-terminal
pcmanfm
moc
conky-all
blueman
scrot
